title: Governor Montgomery Declares Right To Choose Referendum
summary: Governor Addison Montgomery declares a constitutional referendum for the 111th amendment, the Right To Choose Amendment.
body: The fundamental healthcare privileges of women across Washington are currently stranded in the open air. As an OB/GYN, I would be remiss not to stand up for a woman's right to decide for herself what she does with her own body.
As such, in the 2020 election, a ballot referendum will be held to determine whether Washington should add the following language to the state constitution as the 111th amendment:

"The right of a citizen of the state of Washington to decide whether they may undergo the termination of a pregnancy shall not be infringed by the State of Washington at any period preceding 24 weeks of gestation for any reason, and may not be infringed thereafter should the citizen's life be at risk if the pregnancy were not to be terminated."
